project_type: React 18 SPA with Supabase realtime sync, deployed on Vercel
test_framework: No tests - single-file app with no test infrastructure
test_command: npm run build (no test suite exists)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npm run build' to verify no compilation errors. 2. Manually verify the logic changes are correct by reading the code.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Validation is via successful Vite build (static analysis + JSX compilation). No Supabase credentials available in sandbox.
contribution_requirements: Keep single-file architecture. Do not change Supabase table schema. Must work without Supabase (localStorage fallback).
key_patterns: All app logic in src/App.jsx (~4500 lines). State management uses React useState/useRef hooks. Supabase realtime subscription in useEffect. Cloud sync via debounced upsert. Projects stored as array in state with each project having {id, name, password, workspaces, activeTab, nextId}. deviceId for self-echo suppression. skipNextSaveRef for preventing save loops during project switches.
directory_structure: src/App.jsx (entire app), src/supabase.js (Supabase client), src/main.jsx (React entry), src/index.css (TailwindCSS), public/ (static assets)
